title: Small bats
description: An addon for the Vampirism mod that aims to expand and enhance the vampire experience.
body:
A vampirism addon, aimed to expand and enhance the features of vampires. Some key features are:
- Includes enhancements like hanging off the ceiling as a bat.
- Allows vampires to sleep through the day as a bat upside down
- A vampire mist form, allows for squeezing through tight spaces
- Reintroduces the capability to consume pure blood as high-leveled vampire

A very new and early mod, content may be unfinished and/or buggy.
